steps.title: Discover
steps.text: We talk through your goals, audience, offers, and the kind of content your brand actually needs.

steps.title: Plan
steps.text: I shape the content plan, shot list, location rhythm, and creative direction so the shoot feels calm.

steps.title: Film / Edit
steps.text: I capture clean footage or craft your existing clips into polished social-first edits.

steps.title: Deliver
steps.text: You receive ready-to-post content that represents your brand with care and consistency.
